name: Vessk: Play with hand and desk!

reviews.review_description: Jank game with A LOT of potential if the devs keep going.
Cant even make a account, error messages kept popping up, i was really excited to play a tracking hand game and ofc it doesnt work, waste of time. Bad boy game
It kept popping up error messages and I tried to join the lobbies and it kept popping up error messages
Im not able to even create an account
It's so bad at the start you can't finish it it took me like 25 minutes to start the game.

First Impressions video review here: https://youtu.be/j8tIvXPBMOQ

The feeling of hitting the desk with your real hands is really cool, there are just two games right now but there are more on the way, should be interesting to see how this game develops!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review and the great video!

We have enjoyed it and are interested in your work.

We have carefully examined the designs which may have caused your inconvenience and confusion, including virtual desk generation and adjustment, and the button responses. The foundings have been shared and disscussed with our development team and improvements should be implemented in the next update.

Encouraged by your playing and the review, we will continue to further improve the game and make it more comfortable and exciting.

Thank you.

reviews.review_description: This desk gaming concept has potential to be fun when more in-app games become available.
